markdownRemark.excerpt: As salāmu ʿalaikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh, Abū Mu’tasim’s Friday night class (telelink) will now be between maġrib and ʿishāʾ prayers at As-Ṣaḥāba Library…
markdownRemark.html:
As salāmu ʿalaikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

Abū Mu’tasim’s Friday night class (telelink) will now be between maġrib and ʿishāʾ prayers at As-Ṣaḥāba Library with a 3-way to Muṣallá As-Ṣaḥāba. It will continue to be for both brothers and sisters.

Please pass on this message.

frontmatter.title: Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān's Sunday Night Class
